mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PUSH_TOKENS (USER_ID, PLATFORM, TOKEN, IS_ACTIVE, LAST_SEEN_AT) VALUES (#{userId}, #{platform}, #{token}, #{isActive}, #{lastSeenAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, WM.USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_SETTINGS WS ON WS.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE_MEMBER_SCHEDULES WMS ON WMS.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND WMS.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND WMS.DAY_OF_WEEK = WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) + 1 LEFT JOIN ATTENDANCE_RECORDS AR ON AR.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND AR.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND AR.WORK_DATE = CURDATE() AND AR.CHECK_IN_AT IS NOT NULL WHERE WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE IN ('STAFF', 'MANAGER') AND DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(WMS.SCHEDULED_CHECK_IN_TIME, WS.DEFAULT_CHECK_IN_TIME), '%H:%i') = #{targetTime} AND AR.ID IS NULL

SELECT DISTINCT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, WM.USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_SETTINGS WS ON WS.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 LEFT JOIN WORKPLACE_MEMBER_SCHEDULES WMS ON WMS.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND WMS.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND WMS.DAY_OF_WEEK = WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) + 1 INNER JOIN ATTENDANCE_RECORDS AR ON AR.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND AR.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND AR.WORK_DATE = CURDATE() AND AR.CHECK_IN_AT IS NOT NULL AND AR.CHECK_OUT_AT IS NULL WHERE WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE IN ('STAFF', 'MANAGER') AND DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(WMS.SCHEDULED_CHECK_OUT_TIME, WS.DEFAULT_CHECK_OUT_TIME), '%H:%i') = #{targetTime}

SELECT DISTINCT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, WM.USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 WHERE WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE = 'OWNER' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM2 WHERE WM2.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND WM2.ROLE IN ('STAFF', 'MANAGER') AND WM2.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ) AND WM.USER_ID <> 1 AND WM.WORKPLACE_ID > 4

SELECT DISTINCT SU.NAME AS STAFF_NAME, PT.ID AS PUSH_TOKEN_ID, WMM.USER_ID AS OWNER_USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN USERS SU ON SU.ID = WM.USER_ID INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WMM ON WM.WORKPLACE_ID = WMM.WORKPLACE_ID AND WMM.ROLE = 'OWNER' AND WMM.RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH = 1 AND WMM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WMM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 WHERE WM.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND WM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, WM.USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 WHERE WM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WM.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT AR.ID AS RECORD_ID, WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, WM.USER_ID, PT.TOKEN FROM ATTENDANCE_RECORDS AR INNER JOIN WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM ON WM.WORKPLACE_ID = AR.WORKPLACE_ID AND WM.USER_ID = AR.USER_ID AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE IN ('STAFF', 'MANAGER') INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = AR.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = AR.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 WHERE AR.STATUS = 'WORKING' AND AR.CHECK_OUT_AT IS NULL AND AR.CHECK_IN_AT <= NOW() - INTERVAL #{hours} HOUR AND (AR.LONG_WORKING_NOTIFIED IS NULL OR AR.LONG_WORKING_NOTIFIED = 0)

SELECT WM.WORKPLACE_ID AS workplaceId, W.NAME AS workplaceName, PT.TOKEN AS token, pending.CNT AS pendingCount FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN PUSH_TOKENS PT ON PT.USER_ID = WM.USER_ID AND PT.IS_ACTIVE = 1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT AR.WORKPLACE_ID, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM ATTENDANCE_REQUESTS ARQ INNER JOIN ATTENDANCE_RECORDS AR ON AR.ID = ARQ.ATTENDANCE_RECORD_ID WHERE ARQ.STATUS = 'PENDING' GROUP BY AR.WORKPLACE_ID ) pending ON pending.WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID WHERE WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE = 'OWNER'
